summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All five open PRs are classified independently; no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Independent open PR that may be maintainer-reviewable, but it is not duplicate/superseded within this inventory shard and no mutating action is allowed or warranted.
Independent feature PR with author-followup/proof risk. It should stay open for normal maintainer/author handling, not be closed in this shard.
Independent focused provider fix candidate. Failed proof blocks merge/fixed-by closeout, but does not justify closing it as duplicate, superseded, or low-signal.
Independent test-only PR awaiting proof/maintainer review. It is not safely closable as duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, or low-signal from the hydrated evidence.
Independent automation PR with failing checks and author-followup risk. Keep open for normal review rather than planning a close in this inventory shard.
